entities.name: Calendar Tagging System
entities.context: Framework for organizing calendar events with metadata tags including ambiguity, weekend, and priority preferences

entities.name: BLUF
entities.context: Bottom Line Up Front - output format that adapts based on meeting priority and stakeholder type

entities.name: Ambiguity Levels
entities.context: Three-tier system ([A-0] Minimal, [A-1] Baseline, [A-2] Full) indicating requirement clarity for meetings

entities.name: Weekend Tags
entities.context: Tags for weekend meeting preferences: [WEX] exception allowed, [WEP] weekend preferred

entities.name: Priority Preferences
entities.context: GPT tags for meeting prioritization: internal [GPT-I], external [GPT-E], founder [GPT-F]

entities.name: Tag Activation
entities.context: Asterisk mechanism at end of tag block that activates the tags

entities.name: Critical Meetings
entities.context: High-priority meetings marked with !! or [LD-INV] requiring time block protection

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company, referenced via email domain mycareerspan.com

entities.name: Series A Funding Discussion
entities.context: Example meeting type requiring pitch deck in advance

relationships.context: Ambiguity levels are a component of the calendar tagging system

GPT priority tags are a component of the calendar tagging system
